summary: Completed testing of Razorpay payment gateway integration. Backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) working correctly. Fixed critical frontend bug with react-razorpay import. Landing page pricing section and dashboard upgrade modal both trigger payment flow correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PaymentModal.jsx had incorrect import - changed from 'import useRazorpay from react-razorpay' to 'import { useRazorpay } from react-razorpay'
FIXED: useRazorpay hook returns object {Razorpay, isLoading, error}, not array - updated destructuring
Backend payment endpoints properly validate: free plan rejection, invalid plan handling, authentication requirements
Razorpay order creation working with LIVE keys - orders are being created successfully
Payment verification endpoint ready but cannot be tested without completing actual payment

test_credentials.razorpay_key_id: rzp_live_S75Pm55LYocWaN (LIVE keys - do not complete actual payments)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing plans from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay payment integration fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/payments/config, POST /api/payments/create-order, POST /api/payments/verify, GET /api/payments/history, GET /api/payments/orders, GET /api/payments/subscription. Frontend: PaymentModal.jsx component uses react-razorpay library. IMPORTANT: These are LIVE Razorpay keys - payment verification cannot be tested without real card transactions.

GET /api/payments/config.details: Returns Razorpay public key (rzp_live_*), currency (INR), company name (gradnext)

POST /api/payments/create-order.details: Creates Razorpay order for paid plans. Returns order_id, amount in paise, key_id. Rejects free plans (400) and invalid plans (404). Requires authentication (401/403 without auth)

GET /api/payments/history.details: Returns user's payment history. Requires authentication

GET /api/payments/orders.details: Returns user's order history with razorpay_order_id, status, plan details

GET /api/payments/subscription.details: Returns subscription status. Free trial users show has_subscription: false

landing_page_pricing_buttons.details: 3 plan cards displayed (Free Trial, Pro Subscriber, Last Mile Prep). 'Get Pro Subscriber' and 'Get Last Mile Prep' buttons trigger payment flow

payment_modal_from_landing.details: PaymentModal opens with plan details, price, 'Secured by Razorpay' message, and Pay button

dashboard_upgrade_modal.details: Clicking locked features (Peer Practice, 1:1 Coaching) shows 'Upgrade Required' modal with plan options

payment_modal_from_dashboard.details: Clicking 'Upgrade Now' in upgrade modal opens PaymentModal with correct plan and price

mocked_apis.payment_verification: CANNOT BE TESTED - Razorpay keys are LIVE, actual payment required to test verification flow

bug_fixed.issue: Frontend crashed with 'react_razorpay__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1___default is not a function or its return value is not iterable'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Incorrect import syntax for react-razorpay library. Used default import instead of named import, and array destructuring instead of object destructuring
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed 'import useRazorpay from react-razorpay' to 'import { useRazorpay } from react-razorpay' and 'const [Razorpay] = useRazorpay()' to 'const { Razorpay, isLoading, error } = useRazorpay()'
